META_DESC: Autumn package at Hotel Asteria Venray: an overnight stay in a Deluxe room with private infrared sauna, a welcome with Limburg vlaai, breakfast buffet and a three-course dinner. From €128.50 p.p.
SCHEMA_OFFER_DESC: An overnight stay in a Deluxe room with private infrared sauna, a welcome with coffee and Limburg vlaai, an extensive breakfast buffet and a three-course dinner.
HERO_SUBTITLE: An overnight stay in a Deluxe room with private sauna, a welcome with Limburg vlaai, breakfast and a three-course dinner. All taken care of, you just have to arrive.
ARR_C_INTRO: A relaxed autumn stay in North Limburg, with a Deluxe room, private sauna, dinner and breakfast included.
ARR_C_F1_DESC: Coffee or tea with a slice of Limburg vlaai on arrival
ARR_C_F2_NAME: An overnight stay in a Deluxe room
ARR_C_F2_DESC: Spacious room with a private infrared sauna
ARR_C_F4_DESC: Seasonal dishes, unhurried at the table

OMG_ARIA: The surroundings of Hotel Asteria in autumn
OMG_IMG_ALT: Autumnal natural landscape in North Limburg
OMG_BODY: North Limburg at its best in autumn: walk or cycle through De Maasduinen National Park and the Grote Peel. Free walking and cycling routes at the hotel, and warm up on return with the sauna in your room.
ARR_C_FINEPRINT: * Price per person based on a double room, excluding €2 city tax per person per night. · Bookable 8 September to 30 November.
ROOM_BASE_FEATS_STATIC: ~25 m² · king-size bed · private infrared sauna · seating area · air conditioning
